title: Oriented Birds grind out a draw
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The former Western...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The former Western Cape Third Division champions, Oriented Birds Football Club, collected four valuable points from their weekend Safa Eden Hollywoodbets Regional Men's League fixtures after a hard-fought draw and victory at Extension 23.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The former Western Cape Third Division champions, Oriented Birds Football Club, collected four valuable points from their weekend Safa Eden Hollywoodbets Regional Men's League fixtures after a hard-fought draw and victory at Extension 23."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In their opening match, the Plett-based outfit were held to a 1-1 draw by the resilient Sea Birds from Mossel Bay. The encounter proved to be a tightly contested affair, with both teams showing tactical discipline and physical commitment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oriented Birds conceded an early goal in the first half but responded with sustained pressure, forcing Sea Birds to defend deep for long periods.","html":"Oriented Birds conceded an early goal in the first half but responded with sustained pressure, forcing Sea Birds to defend deep for long periods."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Despite dominating possession and creating several chances, the visitors were unable to convert their opportunities and had to settle for a share of the spoils.","html":"Despite dominating possession and creating several chances, the visitors were unable to convert their opportunities and had to settle for a share of the spoils."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Yellow Marines bounced back strongly in their second fixture, delivering a confident 2-0 win over newly promoted Flying Eagles.","html":"The Yellow Marines bounced back strongly in their second fixture, delivering a confident 2-0 win over newly promoted Flying Eagles."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Displaying sharp passing, intelligent movement and solid defensive organisation, Oriented Birds controlled the match from start to finish. Their quality on the ball and composure in key moments ensured a deserved victory.","html":"Displaying sharp passing, intelligent movement and solid defensive organisation, Oriented Birds controlled the match from start to finish. Their quality on the ball and composure in key moments ensured a deserved victory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Experienced midfielder Melisizwe \"Masango\" Duda said the team was disappointed not to claim maximum points in the opening match. \"It wasn't a difficult game for us, but conceding early made it harder,\" he said.","html":"Experienced midfielder Melisizwe \"Masango\" Duda said the team was disappointed not to claim maximum points in the opening match. \"It wasn't a difficult game for us, but conceding early made it harder,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Duda added that the team remains focused on improvement.","html":"Duda added that the team remains focused on improvement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
